Information Systems and Technology (English)

Career Opportunities

MENU

Students who graduate from our department can be employed in the following departments:

IT Specialist

Developer

Web Specialist or Web Programmer

Mobile Device Specialist or Programmer

Database Administrator

Business Intelligence Specialist

Network and Security Manager

Industry 4.0 and Robotic Technologies Specialist

In addition, our students have the opportunity to develop a career as a middle or senior manager in the IT Industry.
